files.patch:
@@ -22,6 +22,26 @@ jobs:
       - name: Lint
         run: make lint
 
+  worker:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "20"
+          cache: "pnpm"
+          cache-dependency-path: internal/tracking/worker/pnpm-lock.yaml
+      - name: Enable Corepack (pnpm)
+        run: corepack enable
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: pnpm -C internal/tracking/worker install --frozen-lockfile
+      - name: Lint
+        run: pnpm -C internal/tracking/worker lint
+      - name: Build
+        run: pnpm -C internal/tracking/worker build
+      - name: Test
+        run: pnpm -C internal/tracking/worker test
+
   darwin-cgo-build:
     runs-on: macos-latest
     steps:

@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@ SHELL := /bin/bash
 .DEFAULT_GOAL := build
 
 .PHONY: build gog gogcli gog-help gogcli-help help fmt fmt-check lint test ci tools
+.PHONY: worker-ci
 
 BIN_DIR := $(CURDIR)/bin
 BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/gog
@@ -84,3 +85,8 @@ test:
 	@go test ./...
 
 ci: pnpm-gate fmt-check lint test
+
+worker-ci:
+	@pnpm -C internal/tracking/worker lint
+	@pnpm -C internal/tracking/worker build
+	@pnpm -C internal/tracking/worker test
